target_area.description: Results Section 4.3 Table 5 material-effect scope sentence and adjacent static-gate boundary

change_summary: Replaced the longer 'sets the material claim boundary' sentence with 'defines the material-effect scope'.
Removed a rendered page-5 hyphenation where 'material claim bound-' ended one line and 'ary' opened the next.
Kept the material-effect claim boundary semantics while making the transition into covered bins shorter and more ACL-like.

observations: Before: page 5 rendered 'Table 5 sets the material claim bound-' followed by 'ary' on the next line.
After: page 5 renders the complete sentence 'Table 5 defines the material-effect scope.' without the boundary split.
Page 6 Figure 3 and its caption remain stable after the local sentence compaction.
